headline: Microchip Expands dsPIC33A DSC Family for High-Density AI Data Center Power, Complex Motor Control and Intelligent Sensing
summary: Devices integrate precise real-time control, rich analog capability and post-quantum cryptography to simplify designs and help enable secure, high-performance applicationsCHANDLER, Ariz., April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As AI servers, data centers, automotive and industrial systems demand higher efficiency designs, deterministic real-time control and quantum-resistant cryptography, Microchip Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: MCHP) has added dsPIC33AK256MPS306 Digital Signal Controllers (DSCs) to its d
